name: Venice Vaporetto VR: Grand Canal Ride

reviews.review_description: Part of a bundle, I opted to get when I saw an individual one the bundle looked like  great deal and option. This one is horrible,  could not be bothered to suffer through it.  Not a fan.

I have only once been to Venezia during the Regata Storica 2022. There's difference between seeing endless ordered rows of the Barche e gondole, with endless, various teams in colorful dresses and seeing just the usual craziness on fascinating, busy network of waterways with vaporetti, barche e gondole. 

This VR tour complements my Venetian journey but it doesn't end here. This tour gives me an idea to visit Venezia again, to spent up to a week there and to see and discover more of this exquisite city.
Video is blurry and it stops and starts continuously. Not a fan at all.
